'''kamozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemkorite|zemkorite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemkorite|zemkorite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kamozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæmezheth|kæmezheth]] || [[word:kæmezhej|kæmezhej]] || [[word:kæmezhesh|kæmezhesh]] || [[word:kæmezhe|kæmezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kamomozhoth|kamomozhoth]] || [[word:kamomozhoj|kamomozhoj]] || [[word:kamomozhosh|kamomozhosh]] || [[word:kamomozho|kamomozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kamozhoth|kamozhoth]] || [[word:kamozhoj|kamozhoj]] || [[word:kamozhosh|kamozhosh]] || [[word:kamozho|kamozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kamofzhoth|kamofzhoth]] || [[word:kamofzhoj|kamofzhoj]] || [[word:kamofzhosh|kamofzhosh]] || [[word:kamofzhof|kamofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kamozhotho|kamozhotho]] || [[word:kamozhojo|kamozhojo]] || [[word:kamozhosho|kamozhosho]] || [[word:kamozhoko|kamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kamozhoth|kamozhoth]] || [[word:kamozhoj|kamozhoj]] || [[word:kamozhosh|kamozhosh]] || [[word:kamozho|kamozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kamozhothol|kamozhothol]] || [[word:kamozhojol|kamozhojol]] || [[word:kamozhoshol|kamozhoshol]] || [[word:kamozhokol|kamozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kamozhothotho|kamozhothotho]] || [[word:kamozhojojo|kamozhojojo]] || [[word:kamozhoshosho|kamozhoshosho]] || [[word:kamozhoko|kamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kamozhothon|kamozhothon]] || [[word:kamozhojon|kamozhojon]] || [[word:kamozhoshon|kamozhoshon]] || [[word:kamozhokon|kamozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kamozhothoro|kamozhothoro]] || [[word:kamozhojoro|kamozhojoro]] || [[word:kamozhoshoro|kamozhoshoro]] || [[word:kamozhokoro|kamozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
